title: dulichium arundinaceum
intro: Dulichium arundinaceum, also known as bald spike-rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of dulichium arundinaceum include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight infections, and promote wound healing. The herbal preparations of the plant typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used externally to treat skin conditions or internally to address fever and other health issues.
